summary: Good unit test coverage for core logic (parse_version, classify_commit, determine_bump, bump_version, generate_changelog) but missing direct unit tests for critical file I/O operations (update_version_file) and the main() orchestrator function—only tested via act integration. Test fixtures are embedded in the workflow file (not provided for audit), limiting visibility. Workflow structure tests are present (YAML parsing, actionlint validation). Would catch most logical regressions but not file I/O or orchestration errors without the integration test. Edge case coverage is moderate (missing malformed JSON, unicode, multi-line commits, error conditions). Output parsing in run_tests.py is somewhat fragile (regex-based assertion). Would benefit from direct unit tests for file operations, more parametrized tests, and clearer fixture definitions.
